title: The Marines Wait Ahead
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the marines wait ahead.
scene: The scene follows the marines wait ahead, keeping the focus on Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't say such things, boss!! You have to live!! Please!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss!! No matter what you might say in

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: As far as all the slaves you released are concerned... you are our Saviour, and we owe you a lifelong debt !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is still life left in you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You are the hero of fish-man Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that makes me happy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there's nobody else who'll challenge me, then I will take charge of the fish-man district!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My name is tiger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and I will protect all those beneath me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Boooo Ooss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thus ended the life...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...of Fisher Tiger, Captain of the Sun Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Koala's Homeland, Foolabout Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nguaa Arrhh Hhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to come crawling back here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm here to slaughter every last one of the humans who sold out big bro til!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So you're arlong, ehh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now, why ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ... would you decide ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll go to the island that sent the report, too...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marine ho vice admiral 'Bof'sccLiflo the future admiral kizari)

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Fisher Tiger is Dead!! murdered by you and your inferior kind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ohhhhhh? Is that right? Dead, is he...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: URG HHHH ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At any rate... I think you need to come along with meee!

summary: The Marines Wait Ahead. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
